creator: meritus@innervision.pl
text:
Port update.
Also changed distfile format from .zip to tar.bz2 to save space/bw.

Fix: PORTNAME=      openx
-PORTVERSION=   2.4.6
+PORTVERSION=   2.4.7
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://download.openx.org/

 MAINTAINER=    meritus@innervision.pl
 COMMENT=       Free, opensource ad server in PHP

-USE_ZIP=       yes
+USE_BZIP2=     yes
 NO_BUILD=      yes
 SUB_LIST+=     PKGNAME=${PKGNAME}
 SUB_FILES+=    pkg-message
